title: Claude Code vs Codex: Which Should You ACTUALLY Use?
summary: Austin Marchese compares Claude Code and Codex across five dimensions: UI, technical output, design output, non-technical output, and cost/speed. He argues that the Codex vs Claude Code framing is the wrong question to ask and suggests focusing energy on a specific undisclosed approach instead.
